prompt: Using the provided reference image as the brand and character base, transform the flat logo into a warm, cute 3D promotional image for a first-time marche food-stall appearance. Keep the same white cat mascot identity, yellow forehead patch, round yellow chest accent, smiling closed-eye expression, handmade hot dog shop theme, and the shop name R-GARDEN*Sui. Place the mascot full-body in front of a cozy wooden festival stall at night, rendered as a soft plush toy character. Add a wooden arched shop sign across the top with the Japanese headline 手作りホットドッグのお店, the shop name, and small hot dog / coffee-bean style decorative icons inspired by the reference border. Give the mascot two food props: 1 hot dog in one paw and 1 spiral tornado potato skewer in the other. Add warm string lights, a striped awning, condiment bottles, shallow depth of field, and a friendly market-event atmosphere. Include exactly 2 chalkboard menu signs in front of the stall: left sign labeled Hot Dog with a hot dog doodle, and right sign labeled Tornado Potato with a spiral potato doodle. Use a cinematic square composition, golden lighting, high-detail 3D rendering, and an inviting SNS/event advertisement feel.
